creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 205241
patch to update x11/xorgproto to 2019.1

Hi!
I'd like to get an exp-run for the update of x11/xorgproto if possible.  Patch is attached.
Looking at changelogs this update should be safe, but since it has over 850 direct dependencies (according to freshports) and a whole lot more indirect dependencies, I'd like a run just to be sure.
Thank you!
Regards
Niclas
